stonetop.summary: Three vicious wraiths bound to a tattered mantle, longing to slip free and feast.

system.concept: Three vicious wraiths bound to a tattered mantle, longing to slip free and feast.
system.description: A trio of wraiths tethered to a tattered mantle. They whisper their longings to whoever wears it, and the wearer can let them slip free to feast on the living — though they are loathe to return to the mantle, and must be spent or Persuaded back. Their cost is the souls they feast upon.
